name: Blackwing - Pinaki the Waxing Moon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＢＦ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ブラックフェザー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>上</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>弦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のピナーカ
name_jp_tl: Black Feather - Pinaka the Waxing Moon
desc: Cannot be used as Synchro Material, except for the Synchro Summon of a "Blackwing" Synchro Monster. During the End Phase, if this card is in the GY because it was sent there from the field this turn: You can add 1 "Blackwing" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Blackwing - Pinaki the Waxing Moon". You can only use this effect of "Blackwing - Pinaki the Waxing Moon" once per turn.
